title: Shared Image & Management OS Security Risk Chain
description: A visual breakdown of how vulnerabilities in shared OS images and the management layer can propagate through a cloud environment to create security risks.
relationships: Attacker exploits a vulnerability in the Management Hypervisor to access the Control Plane
Compromised Base Image is used to instantiate both Tenant VM 1 and Tenant VM 2
A vulnerability in the shared image (e.g., outdated library) creates a common attack vector
Compromise of one tenant VM can lead to a lateral movement attack to the other
